pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Plans for Every Firm

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you want to know about Adala AI

items.a: Yes, the free plan is available forever with no expiry. All paid plans come with a full 30-day free trial — all features unlocked, no restrictions, no credit card required.

items.q: Does the platform fully support Arabic?
items.a: Yes, the platform is built from the ground up for Arabic and fully supports RTL. The AI assistant also handles Arabic with high accuracy.

items.q: Can I import my existing data?
items.a: Absolutely. We support data import from Excel, CSV, and common systems. Our support team will help you with migration for free.

items.q: How is my data stored? Is it secure?
items.a: Your data is protected with AES-256 encryption and stored completely isolated from other firms (Multi-tenant). Automatic daily backups.

items.q: Can the platform be used on mobile?
items.a: Yes, the platform is fully responsive on mobile and tablets. iOS and Android apps are coming soon.

items.q: Do you support custom visual identity for the firm?
items.a: Yes, the Professional plan and above allow customization of logo, colors, and invoice templates. The Enterprise plan allows full White Label.

privacy.title: Your Privacy and File Confidentiality Are Our Priority
privacy.subtitle: No firm can access another firm's files, and your data is only accessible by authorized users within your firm. Your data is protected with AES-256 encryption and stored in a completely isolated environment.

payment.resultTitle: Result: Your Fees in Your Account
payment.resultDesc: While you focus on the case, Adala manages the entire collection process on your behalf
features: Create an invoice in under a minute
Send a direct payment link in one click
Manage all revenue from one dashboard
payment.problemsBadge: Why do many law firms lose their fees?

problems.problem: Forgetting to follow up on pending invoices loses thousands in revenue every month
problems.solution: Automatic client reminders and smart tracking for every invoice until payment

problems.problem: Delayed collections affect cash flow and hinder firm growth
problems.solution: Instant payment links sent to clients reduce average payment time from 30 days to 3 days

problems.problem: No clear financial reports — you don't know where your revenue is going
problems.solution: Real-time financial dashboard: every dollar recorded, every invoice tracked, every report ready in one click

problems.problem: Without a collection system, chasing clients is exhausting and unprofessional
problems.solution: Fully professional collection system: from issuing the invoice to sending the payment receipt

payment.globalTitle: Firms can issue invoices, send payment links, and track payment status electronically — all from inside Adala
payment.globalSubtitle: Whether the client is in Riyadh, Dubai, or London — the payment link reaches them instantly and they pay in seconds.
payment.ctaFooter: No credit card · 3-minute setup · Full Arabic & English support
